sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka neih man pha pen na hi
Koi pan ka piang hong gen
Bang ka hi hiam hong hilh ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lam ka pial ciang hong tai ding
Lam hong hilh ding hong cing ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hilh leitung gam sim tham ah
Mi in zong zo thei sih-na

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nong hilh hi nopna ngah na’ng
Ka neih manpha pen na hi
